message.content:
To evaluate how closely your clone matches the original and identify areas for improvement, we analyze each screenshot (Image 1 = original, Images 2–5 = clone) across **visual fidelity, layout, content, and details**:  


### 1. Header & Navigation (Image 1 vs. Image 2)  
- **Match**: Logo (“NOW & ALWAYS CONSTRUCTION”), navigation links (“HOME,” “ABOUT,” “SERVICES,” “PROJECTS,” “CONTACT”), and “CALL NOW” button are present.  
- **Improvements**:  
  - **Background Image**: The original uses a modern building facade; the clone uses a different tower (structural mismatch).  
  - **Text Styling**: The original’s “NOW AND ALWAYS (PTY) LTD” is smaller and positioned differently; the clone’s version is larger and misaligned.  
  - **Button Styling**: The original has three buttons (“GET A FREE QUOTE,” “CALL US,” “WHATSAPP”); the clone omits these, reducing functionality.  
  - **Footer Banner**: The original has a “frontend preview” banner; the clone does not, missing this contextual element.  


### 2. Services Section (Image 1 vs. Image 3)  
- **Match**: The “TESTIMONIALS” and “WHAT OUR CLIENTS SAY” headings are present.  
- **Improvements**:  
  - **Content Gaps**: The original likely includes service cards (e.g., “Renovations,” “Plumbing”) with “LEARN MORE” buttons (seen in Image 3’s placeholder). The clone’s section is incomplete (no service cards or detailed content).  


### 3. Footer (Image 1 vs. Images 4–5)  
- **Match**: Footer sections (“NOW & ALWAYS (PTY) LTD” info, “NAVIGATION,” “SERVICES,” “GET IN TOUCH”) and contact details (phone, WhatsApp, email) are present.  
- **Improvements**:  
  - **Button Inconsistency**: The original has a “GET A FREE QUOTE” button in the header; the clone places it in the footer (misaligned placement).  
  - **Social Media**: The original may include social icons (seen in Image 5); the clone’s implementation is inconsistent.  
  - **Copyright Text**: The clone’s footer has “2026” (future date), while the original likely uses the current year (e.g., “2024”).  


### Overall Assessment  
Your clone captures the **core structure** (header, navigation, footer) but lacks **visual fidelity** (background image, button styling) and **content completeness** (service cards, footer banner). Key areas for improvement:  
- Match the original’s background image and text positioning.  
- Add the “GET A FREE QUOTE,” “CALL US,” and “WHATSAPP” buttons (from Image 1) to the header.  
- Complete the services section with detailed content (e.g., service cards).  
- Ensure footer elements (buttons, social media, copyright) align with the original’s design.  


By addressing these details, your clone will more closely mirror the original’s design and functionality.
